languages.text: {n}Вам навстречу выходят трое аристократов в сопровождении блюстителей. Их возглавляет мужчина в мундире цветов династии фон Валанциус. Есть что-то неуловимо знакомое в уцелевшем куске лица — остальная плоть незнакомца сменена имплантами, превратившими человека в жуткое подобие оного. Аристократ с подозрением прищуривается, водянисто-голубой глаз скрывается под темными ресницами. До ваших ушей доносится шипение сервоприводов и скрип металла о металл, когда аристократ словно бы невзначай кладет аугментированные пальцы на эфес меча — явно имеющего ксенопроисхождение.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Вам навстречу выходят трое аристократов в сопровождении блюстителей. Их возглавляет мужчина в мундире цветов династии фон Валанциус. Есть что-то неуловимо знакомое в уцелевшем куске лица — остальная плоть незнакомца сменена имплантами, превратившими человека в жуткое подобие оного. Аристократ с подозрением прищуривается, водянисто-голубой глаз скрывается под темными ресницами. До ваших ушей доносится шипение сервоприводов и скрип металла о металл, когда аристократ словно бы невзначай кладет аугментированные пальцы на эфес меча — явно имеющего ксенопроисхождение.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Three nobles, accompanied by enforcers, come out to meet you. They are led by a man wearing a uniform in von Valancius colours. There is something vaguely familiar about the intact portion of his face — the rest of the stranger's flesh has been replaced with implants that have turned him into a macabre semblance of himself. The nobleman narrows his organic eye in suspicion, its cerulean blue hiding beneath his dark lashes. You hear the hiss of servo-motors and the creak of metal against metal as he casually rests his augmented fingers on the hilt of his sword, which is clearly of xenos origin.{/n}

languages.text: {n}三名贵族在执法者的陪同下出来迎接你。为首的那个男人身穿冯·瓦兰修斯家族配色的制服。他脸上尚存的那部分血肉看着有点眼熟，余下的部分则被植入物取代，让他看起来像是自己的怪诞翻版。这位贵族眯起那只有机眼，狐疑地打量着，湛蓝的眼眸藏在他深色的睫毛之下。你听到了伺服电机的嘶嘶声与金属的摩擦声，他正随意地将加装了植入物的手指搭在剑柄上，而那把剑显然是异形造物。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Three nobles, accompanied by enforcers, come out to meet you. They are led by a man wearing a uniform in von Valancius colours. There is something vaguely familiar about the intact portion of his face — the rest of the stranger's flesh has been replaced with implants that have turned him into a macabre semblance of himself. The nobleman narrows his organic eye in suspicion, its cerulean blue hiding beneath his dark lashes. You hear the hiss of servo-motors and the creak of metal against metal as he casually rests his augmented fingers on the hilt of his sword, which is clearly of xenos origin.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Trois nobles escortés par des prévôts sortent pour vous accueillir. À leur tête, un homme revêtu d'un uniforme aux couleurs des von Valancius. Si la partie intacte de son visage a quelque chose de vaguement familier, le reste de son corps a été remplacé par des implants qui l'ont transformé en une caricature macabre de sa propre personne. L'aristocrate plisse son œil organique d'un air suspicieux et ses cils noirs viennent masquer partiellement son iris azur. Vous entendez le sifflement de servomoteurs et le grincement du métal alors qu'il pose nonchalamment ses doigts augmentés sur la poignée de son épée, qui est visiblement d'origine xénos.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Three nobles, accompanied by enforcers, come out to meet you. They are led by a man wearing a uniform in von Valancius colours. There is something vaguely familiar about the intact portion of his face — the rest of the stranger's flesh has been replaced with implants that have turned him into a macabre semblance of himself. The nobleman narrows his organic eye in suspicion, its cerulean blue hiding beneath his dark lashes. You hear the hiss of servo-motors and the creak of metal against metal as he casually rests his augmented fingers on the hilt of his sword, which is clearly of xenos origin.{/n}

Si la partie intacte de son visage a quelque chose de vaguement familier, le reste de son corps a été remplacé par des implants qui l'ont transformé en une caricature macabre de sa propre personne. L'aristocrate plisse son œil organique d'un air suspicieux et ses cils noirs viennent masquer partiellement son iris azur. languages.text: {n}İnfazcılar eşliğinde üç soylu seni karşılamaya geliyor. Başlarında von Valancius renklerini taşıyan üniformalı bir adam var. Yüzünün sağlam kalan kısmı, belli belirsiz tanıdık ayrıntılar taşıyor. Yüzünün kalanı ise onu ürkütücü derecede kendini kendine dönüştüren implantlarla değiştirilmiş. Soylu, koyu renk kirpiklerinin altına saklanmış organik mavi gözünü kısıp dikkatle bakıyor. Hizmotorların tıslamasını ve metalin metale sürtünmesini duyuyorsun, ardından da zeno kökenli olduğu belli olan kılıcının kabzasını kavrayan ogmentli parmaklarının sesini işitiyorsun.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Three nobles, accompanied by enforcers, come out to meet you. They are led by a man wearing a uniform in von Valancius colours. languages.text: {n}Tres nobles, acompañados por el personal de seguridad, salen a tu encuentro. Les acompaña un hombre vestido con un uniforme en los colores de von Valancius. Hay algo extrañamente familiar en la parte intacta de su cara. El resto de su carne ha sido reemplazada por implantes que lo convierten en un mero espectro de lo que fue. El noble, suspicaz, entrecierra su ojo orgánico, ocultando su azul intenso tras las pestañas, y oyes el chirrido del metal y el siseo de los servomotores cuando apoya sus dedos aumentados sobre la empuñadura de su espada, que es inconfundiblemente de origen xenos.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Three nobles, accompanied by enforcers, come out to meet you. They are led by a man wearing a uniform in von Valancius colours. There is something vaguely familiar about the intact portion of his face — the rest of the stranger's flesh has been replaced with implants that have turned him into a macabre semblance of himself. The nobleman narrows his organic eye in suspicion, its cerulean blue hiding beneath his dark lashes. You hear the hiss of servo-motors and the creak of metal against metal as he casually rests his augmented fingers on the hilt of his sword, which is clearly of xenos origin.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Tres nobles, acompañados por el personal de seguridad, salen a tu encuentro. Les acompaña un hombre vestido con un uniforme en los colores de von Valancius. Hay algo extrañamente familiar en la parte intacta de su cara. El resto de su carne ha sido reemplazada por implantes que lo convierten en un mero espectro de lo que fue. El noble, suspicaz, entrecierra su ojo orgánico, ocultando su azul intenso tras las pestañas, y oyes el chirrido del metal y el siseo de los servomotores cuando apoya sus dedos aumentados sobre la empuñadura de su espada, que es inconfundiblemente de origen xenos.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Drei Adelige kommen in Begleitung einiger Enforcer auf dich zu. Sie werden von einem Mann in einer Uniform in den Farben derer von Valancius angeführt. Der intakte Teil seines Gesichtes kommt dir irgendwie bekannt vor ... das übrige Fleisch des Fremden wurde durch Implantate ersetzt, die ihn in ein makaberes Abbild seiner selbst verwandelt haben. Der Adelige kneift misstrauisch sein organisches Auge zusammen, dessen coelinblauen Pupille hinter dunklen Wimpern verborgen ist. Du hörst das Summen von Servomotoren und das Knirschen von Metall auf Metall, als er seine augmentierten Finger auf den Griff seines Schwertes legt, das eindeutig von Xenos stammt.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Three nobles, accompanied by enforcers, come out to meet you. They are led by a man wearing a uniform in von Valancius colours. There is something vaguely familiar about the intact portion of his face — the rest of the stranger's flesh has been replaced with implants that have turned him into a macabre semblance of himself. The nobleman narrows his organic eye in suspicion, its cerulean blue hiding beneath his dark lashes. You hear the hiss of servo-motors and the creak of metal against metal as he casually rests his augmented fingers on the hilt of his sword, which is clearly of xenos origin.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Drei Adelige kommen in Begleitung einiger Enforcer auf dich zu. Sie werden von einem Mann in einer Uniform in den Farben derer von Valancius angeführt. Der intakte Teil seines Gesichtes kommt dir irgendwie bekannt vor ... das übrige Fleisch des Fremden wurde durch Implantate ersetzt, die ihn in ein makaberes Abbild seiner selbst verwandelt haben. Der Adelige kneift misstrauisch sein organisches Auge zusammen, dessen coelinblauen Pupille hinter dunklen Wimpern verborgen ist. Du hörst das Summen von Servomotoren und das Knirschen von Metall auf Metall, als er seine augmentierten Finger auf den Griff seines Schwertes legt, das eindeutig von Xenos stammt.{/n}

languages.text: {n}3人の貴族が、執事の付き添いのもと、あなたに近づいてくる。彼らの先頭に立つのは、フォン・ヴァランシウス家の制服を着た男だ。彼の顔の残った部分には、どこかで見たことがあるような面影がある。残りの肉体は、異種族の機械に置き換えられ、かつての自分とは似ても似つかぬ姿になっている。貴族は、有機的な目を疑いの目で狭くする。彼の瞳は、濃いまつげの下に隠れた天青色だ。彼は、機械のモーターの唸り声と金属同士の軋み声を立てながら、手首に装着された機械の指を剣の柄に軽く置く。明らかに異種族の剣である。{/n}
